# Fetch Performance Test
# Tests performance with aggressive timeouts

# Build the fetch server binary
go build -o mcp-fetch-server .

# Test with aggressive timeout (5 seconds)
timeout 5s exec mcp-fetch-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/list","params":{},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_headers","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/get"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/json"}},"id":4}
EOF

# Verify operations complete within timeout
stdout '"name":"fetch"'
stdout '"statusCode":200'
stdout '"content"'

# Test rapid sequential calls
timeout 10s exec mcp-fetch-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_headers","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/get"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_headers","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/json"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_headers","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/xml"}},"id":5}
EOF

# Verify rapid calls are handled correctly
stdout '"statusCode":200'

# Test with small response size limits (should handle small responses quickly)
timeout 3s exec mcp-fetch-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{"url":"https://httpbin.org/uuid"}},"id":3}
EOF

# Verify small responses are handled quickly
stdout '"content"'
stdout '"size"'
